epic.title: Refactor Dashboard UI: Componentize Vanilla JS Monolith
epic.description: Migrating the Liferay Tunnel admin dashboard and user portal from a monolithic vanilla HTML/JS implementation to a React + Vite SPA.

issues.title: Phase 4.1: Dashboard UI Refactoring SPA Scaffolding
issues.description: Scaffold the React + Vite SPA and integrate with the Go backend via go:embed.

issues.title: Phase 4.2: Magic Link Login Flow
issues.description: Implement Login component mirroring the vanilla logic and aesthetics.

issues.title: Phase 4.3: MFA Challenge & Dashboard Scaffolding
issues.description: Implement MFA Verification logic and base authenticated layout.
